mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where Your Every Whim is Our Command!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this, I stroll into my favorite caf, and they dare to be out of the matcha donuts I love. I mean, the audacity, right? I calmly explain to the cashier that as the esteemed CEO of Bank of Entitlement, it is my divine right to have those donuts ready at all times. Long story short, not only did I receive a lifetime supply of matcha donuts, but they also named a drink after me. I call it the "Hot Josh Special," of course. Just another day living the entitled life!So I'm at this exclusive resort, soaking up the sun, when I notice they've placed me in a room with a slightly obstructed ocean view. Unacceptable, I say! I storm down to the front desk, demand to speak to the manager, and declare that as the one and only Hot Josh, I deserve nothing but the best. The manager, clearly shaken by my presence, upgrades me to the presidential suite with a private pool overlooking the entire coastline. And let me tell you, the view from up there was simply divine. It's tough being this fabulous, but someone has to do it.
